steps.title: Follow the process order
steps.content: The passage lists the steps of an archaeological dig: first a grid is made, then the site is dug and artifacts are recorded and mapped. The blank introduces the next and concluding step.

steps.title: Choose a sequence transition
steps.content: Choice A would introduce an example, not a later step. Choice B would signal opposition, but there is no contrast. Choice C would move backward in time, though the sentence comes after recording and mapping. The answer is D.
